title: Rebirth:Mr Wang
description:
Upcoming games

Об игре
This is a role-playing plot plus level decryption game.
On the surface, Mr. Wang is an enthusiastic apartment repairman, who likes to help female neighbors solve small problems in life, but behind the scenes, Lao Wang is an asshole and likes cuckolds. In the plot, Pharaoh will spy on the neighbors’ privacy while repairing the neighbors, and constantly approach the female neighbors through despicable means.
If you are interested in Lao Wang's story, please don't miss it.

The game operation is simple, the plot is interesting.
The game contains multiple endings.

Other game series recommended by the developer:
SeeKgirl Ⅰ-Ⅵ ，SeeKgirl FOG:Ⅰ，Lost，Taboos: Cracks
description_short: This is a plot game that uses mouse clicks to interact and level puzzles. The game has beautiful graphics and interesting plot. Use your wisdom to help your neighbors!
